title: Campfire Trims
description: A Simple Armor trim mod made for an SMP. Nothing else to add...
body:
(Small note: This is the first project I'm uploading to Modrinth. Also, this was originally made for a Small SMP, but it's here in case anyone else wants to use it.)

Campfire Trims is a simple mod that adds in... armor trims. With 18 new trims, 9 items now trim materials (one of them an original item), and two new metal-based blocksets to play with, it serves as a simple (maybe) addition to any modpack. That's... all that really has to be said here. It's that simple...

Also, almost every Template at this moment is craftable, some being more expensive then others. (One isn't craftable... but I'll leave you to see how to get that one) :)


_(Also Also, this mod was made in the Funny MCreator program, so that explains why this mod is simple)_
